instruction: Read the email below and return Summary, Priority, Action items, and Deadlines.
input:
Subject: Renewals blocked by billing login issue

Hi support,

Sales cannot access the billing workspace and two renewals are blocked. Please confirm the incident owner within 15 minutes, send the next customer update by 10:30 AM, and attach the manual renewal workaround if the fix is still pending.

Thanks.

expected.summary: Support needs to respond because the billing workspace outage is blocking two renewals.
action_items: Confirm the incident owner within 15 minutes
Send the next customer update by 10:30 AM
Attach the manual renewal workaround if the fix is still pending

instruction: Read the email below and return Summary, Priority, Action items, and Deadlines.
input:
Subject: Cutover checklist sign-off

Hello ops,

Before tonight's 7 PM cutover, please have Lan update the rollback table by 3 PM and Minh verify the dependency checklist by 4 PM. If anything slips, post it in the cutover room immediately.

Thanks.

expected.summary: Ops needs the rollback table and dependency checklist finished before tonight's cutover.
action_items: Lan updates the rollback table by 3 PM
Minh verifies the dependency checklist by 4 PM

instruction: Read the email below and return Summary, Priority, Action items, and Deadlines.
input:
Subject: Migration review moved to the afternoon

Hi operations,

The dependency snapshot will be late, so the migration review that was set for Thursday 9 AM now needs to happen at Thursday 2 PM. Please update the calendar and resend the meeting notes by 5 PM today.

Thanks.

expected.summary: The migration review moved to Thursday afternoon and the schedule needs to be updated today.
action_items: Update the calendar
Resend the meeting notes by 5 PM today

instruction: Read the email below and return Summary, Priority, Action items, and Deadlines.
input:
Subject: Customer-ready RCA summary

Hi support leads,

The webhook delay is still under investigation. Please draft a concise customer-ready RCA summary after the debug call and keep the temporary polling workaround in place until we have the final fix.

Thanks.

expected.summary: Support needs a concise follow-up while the webhook delay investigation is still open.
action_items: Draft a concise customer-ready RCA summary after the debug call
Keep the temporary polling workaround in place until the final fix

instruction: Read the email below and return Summary, Priority, Action items, and Deadlines.
input:
Subject: Refund request review

Hi finance,

Please review the refund request for the April order and update the customer on the current handling timeline by Friday noon.

Thanks.

expected.summary: Finance needs to review the refund request and update the customer this week.
action_items: Review the refund request for the April order
Update the customer on the current handling timeline by Friday noon

instruction: Read the email below and return Summary, Priority, Action items, and Deadlines.
input:
Subject: Feature request for scheduled exports

Hi product,

A customer asked whether we plan to support scheduled report exports. Please log the request for next week's roadmap review. No immediate reply is required.

Thanks.

expected.summary: Product should log the scheduled export request for the next roadmap review.
action_items: Log the scheduled report export request

instruction: Read the email below and return Summary, Priority, Action items, and Deadlines.
input:
Subject: Incident notes are published

Hi support team,

The incident notes from yesterday's outage are now posted in the support knowledge base. No response is needed unless someone notices a factual issue.

Thanks.

expected.summary: The incident notes are available for reference and do not require immediate action.
action_items: None

instruction: Read the email below and return Summary, Priority, Action items, and Deadlines.
input:
Subject: Launch metrics handoff

Hi ops,

Before Friday's launch review, please have Quynh refresh the launch metrics sheet by Thursday 4 PM, Bao verify the anomaly summary by Thursday 5 PM, and share any blocker in the launch bridge.

Thanks.

expected.summary: Ops needs the launch metrics sheet and anomaly summary updated before Friday's review.
action_items: Quynh refreshes the launch metrics sheet by Thursday 4 PM
Bao verifies the anomaly summary by Thursday 5 PM
Share any blocker in the launch bridge

instruction: Đọc email dưới đây và trả về các mục Tóm tắt, Ưu tiên, Việc cần làm, Hạn chót.
input:
Chủ đề: Dời lịch launch sync

Chào team vận hành,

Do backfill dashboard hoàn tất muộn hơn dự kiến nên buổi launch sync từ 13h chiều nay cần dời sang 16h chiều nay. Nhờ Vy cập nhật lại calendar và Quân xác nhận đặt phòng trước 14h30.

Cảm ơn.

expected.summary: Buổi launch sync đã được dời sang 16h và team vận hành cần cập nhật lịch ngay chiều nay.
action_items: Vy cập nhật lại calendar
Quân xác nhận đặt phòng trước 14h30

instruction: Đọc email dưới đây và trả về các mục Tóm tắt, Ưu tiên, Việc cần làm, Hạn chót.
input:
Chủ đề: Cần bản cập nhật RCA ngắn gọn

Chào các lead support,

Độ trễ webhook vẫn đang được điều tra. Nhờ team gửi bản cập nhật nguyên nhân ngắn gọn sau cuộc gọi debug và tiếp tục giữ khách hàng ở chế độ polling tạm thời.

Cảm ơn.

expected.summary: Team support cần một bản follow-up ngắn gọn trong khi vẫn đang điều tra độ trễ webhook.
action_items: Gửi bản cập nhật nguyên nhân ngắn gọn sau cuộc gọi debug
Tiếp tục giữ khách hàng ở chế độ polling tạm thời

instruction: Đọc email dưới đây và trả về các mục Tóm tắt, Ưu tiên, Việc cần làm, Hạn chót.
input:
Chủ đề: Đã phát hành bộ tài liệu postmortem

Chào cả nhóm,

Bộ tài liệu postmortem cho buổi review thứ Sáu đã được đăng trên wiki vận hành. Hiện chưa cần phản hồi trừ khi mọi người phát hiện lỗi thực tế.

Cảm ơn.

expected.summary: Bộ tài liệu postmortem đã sẵn sàng để tham khảo và chưa cần hành động ngay.
action_items: None

Cảm ơn.

expected.summary: Team finance cần gửi renewal quote và phản hồi câu hỏi về discount trước sáng mai.
action_items: Gửi renewal quote cuối cho GreenLeaf
